title: No CTX-NNN context-contract for unit_kind=milestone — gatherExecutionContext cannot compose milestone bundle for cascade query
description: DEC-0017 declares work-unit context is composed via bidirectional traversal of config-declared relation_types per unit-kind context contract. Current context-contracts (.project/context-contracts.json) ship 3 entries: CTX-001 task / CTX-002 decision / CTX-003 verification. No entry for unit_kind=milestone. Per DEC-0024 (milestones-as-declarative-organizing-anchor enacted), milestone is the primary entry point — "what's the picture around MILESTONE-NNN" is the canonical query for understanding a body of work + its decomposition + its satisfaction state. Without a milestone context-contract, gatherExecutionContext --unit-id MILESTONE-NNN returns degenerate (unit-only) bundle — no research / decisions / framework-gaps / features / phases / verifications cascade traversal. Plus: existing CTX-001/002/003 carry empty bundle_relation_types[] (registered but not populated) — same gap pattern at smaller scale.

evidence.reference: 3 contracts (CTX-001 task / CTX-002 decision / CTX-003 verification); none for milestone; all carry bundle_relation_types: []
gatherExecutionContext composes ContextBundle per declared context-contract; returns degenerate when bundle_relation_types[] empty or unit_kind absent
DEC-0024 enacts milestones-as-anchor model; cascade requires context-contract
Schema permits unit_kind plain-string keying; no per-kind whitelist

impact: Milestone-anchored work cannot be queried for full context via canonical primitive. LLM (Claude or in-pi) asking "compose context for MILESTONE-007" gets unit-only bundle. The third orchestrator query ("what must happen or have happened before X delivered") for X=milestone is partial — walk-ancestors works on edges if authored, but composed-context-bundle (gather-execution-context) is the unified surface and it can't compose milestone context. Cascade impact: every consumer that anchors on milestones (roadmap-plan satisfaction check; future curation surfaces; LLM-driven decomposition assistance) hits the same gap.
proposed_resolution: Add CTX-NNN entry for unit_kind=milestone with bundle_relation_types covering: (a) milestone_grounded_by_research (in, depth 2) — research feeding the milestone; (b) milestone_addressed_by_decision (in, depth 2) — decisions enacted in service of the milestone; (c) milestone_blocked_by_gap (in, depth 2) — framework-gaps gating milestone satisfaction; (d) milestone_delivered_by_feature (in, depth 3) — features whose acceptance criteria contribute to satisfaction; (e) phase_culminates_at_milestone (in, depth 2) — phases that terminate at this milestone + their tasks via lens; (f) milestone_verified_by (in, depth 1) — verification entries cited as evidence; (g) milestone_depends_on (out, depth 2) — prerequisite milestones. relation_type canonical_ids settle as part of FGAP-047 vocabulary settlement. Once CTX-NNN authored, gatherExecutionContext --unit-id MILESTONE-NNN returns full cascade bundle. Cross-decision: similar context-contract extension warranted for unit_kind=feature + unit_kind=phase + unit_kind=roadmap once those blocks are first-class queryable per FGAP-053 + FGAP-049 + FGAP-055. Also: populate empty bundle_relation_types[] on existing CTX-001/002/003 as part of same arc.
